race.comment: NICCTINI (15) is a Nicconi filly from the stakes winner Rosmartini on debut for the McEvoy yard who looks nicely placed here first time out. She's trialled well leading in, winning her latest, and the stable are going well with their 2yos recently. STRENGTH WITHIN (12)  is a filly by Stay Inside from the stakes-winner Karak on debut for the Tom Dabernig yard. She draws low and looks to have trialled well, keeping safe. ANGELIC RISE (7) has race experience. She struggled on heavy going at Warrnambool first up but is better than that. ASTON (1) is a gelding by So You Think on debut who has jumped out well and can show up.
